subcodes.first_line: O readers of the [Pittsburgh] Spectator newspaper! ‘Abdu’l-Baha traveled thousands of leagues and crossed a vast ocean to reach the land of the free
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قارئین محترم جریده اسپک تی تر عبدالبهاء هزاران فرسنگ طی نمود و در محیط اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Western values; culture, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @unity; oneness of humanity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @East and West; communication between East and West, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
